debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Field K
inst✝ : ValuativeRel K
x : K
⊢ (valuation K) x = 1 ↔ ∃ r, x = ↑↑r

by
  constructor
  · intro hx
    have hx_mem : x ∈ 𝒪[K] := by
      rw [ValuativeRel.mem_valuationSubring_iff]
      simp [hx]
    have hx_inv_mem : x⁻¹ ∈ 𝒪[K] := by
      rw [ValuativeRel.mem_valuationSubring_iff]
      simp [map_inv₀, hx]
    have hx_ne : x ≠ 0 := by

    · ext; simp [mul_inv_cancel hx_ne]
    · ext; simp [inv_mul_cancel hx_ne]
  · rintro ⟨r, rfl⟩
    have hr : (r : K) ∈ 𝒪[K] := r.val.property
    have hrinv : (r⁻¹ : K) ∈ 𝒪[K] := r⁻¹.val.property
    rw [ValuativeRel.mem_valuationSubring_iff] at hr hrinv
    simp only [map_inv₀, Units.val_inv_eq_inv_val, Subring.coe_inv] at hrinv
    have h1 : (valuation K) (r : K) ≤ 1 := hr
    have h2 : ((valuation K) (r : K))⁻¹ ≤ 1 := hrinv
    cases' (valuation K).val_eq_one_or_lt_one_of_le_one (r : K) h1 with h h
    · exact h
    · exfalso
      have : 1 < ((valuation K) (r : K))⁻¹ := one_lt_inv_of_inv h
      linarith [h2]

    · exact le_antisymm h1 (one_le_inv_of_inv_le₀ h0 h2)
